matcher.subject: Science (086)
matcher.coveragePreview: chemical reactions and equations - session 1 grade 10 science students chemical vs physical changes reactants and products word equations balancing chemical equations chemical reactions and equations introduction to chemical changes chemical reactions & equations session 1: from observation to equation physical or chemical? distinguishing physical and chemical changes melting ice: physical change (reversible) burning wood: chemical change (irreversible) key difference: new substance formed? signs of a chemical reaction identifying signs of reactions change in state (solid to gas) color change temperature change (heat/light) gas evolution case study: burning magnesium reactants and products identification reactant: magnesium ribbon (mg) condition: burning in air (oxygen, o2) product: white powder (magnesium oxide, mgo) writing balanced chemical equations balancing chemical equations law: matter is neither created nor destroyed rule: atoms in reactants = atoms in products method: adjust coefficients (numbers before symbols) activity: displacement reaction balancing chemical equations practice reactants: iron (fe) + copper sulphate (cuso4) products: ferrous sulphate (feso4) + coppe...
